title: Affinity Chemical Atlas species entry
description: One chemical species (ADR-0038): the formula → ENGINE-DERIVED composition (per-element count + sourced atomic weight + subtotal), signed charge, and molar mass (Σ subtotals). The derived block is machine-checked — the gate re-parses the formula and re-sums the molar mass from the Valence Table's sourced atomic weights. Names, typical phase, and prose are authored + labeled (never machine-checked). additionalProperties:false everywhere.

formula.$comment: the phase-less formula string (CaCO3, CO3^2-); the parser derives everything below from it

species_class.$comment: element/compound → neutral; either ion class → charged. The gate enforces the charge/class agreement.

names.$comment: authored names, canonical first (systematic ionic names are separately machine-verified in the Valence Table formula builder, ADR-0033)

atomic_weight.$comment: the sourced element weight (must match the Valence Table)

phase.$comment: the phase this species typically takes in first-course contexts — authored, not machine-derived

source.$comment: the atomic-weight source summed into the molar mass; resolves to a docs/SOURCES.md row

reactions.$comment: reaction-family entry ids this species appears in; the gate resolves them
